chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No. D-467 of 2021 Const. Petition No. D-1402 of 2019 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Zia-ul-Haq Kamboh, Advocate for respondent-T.C, Mehrabpur. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G - Sindh. Date of Hearing & Order: 28-11-2023 O R D E R Petitioners are employees of Town Committee, Mehrabpur are aggrieved by the act of respondents, particularly, Chairman and Town Officer, Town Committee, Mehrabpur for withholding certain amounts, amounting to 35% from their salaries since 2017. Learned counsel for Town Committee, Mehrabpur submits that salaries of the petitioners to the extent of 35% from 2017 have already been increased, which is being disputed by learned counsel for the petitioners. Since this is a factual controversy as highlighted above concerning fixation of salaries of the petitioners, we are disposing of these petitions by appointing District Accounts Officer, Naushahro Feroze to examine relevant record of Town Committee, Mehrabpur for determining actual salaries of the petitioners and forward such a report to the Chairman, Town Committee, Mehrabpur for implementation in accordance with law. However, if it is found that certain amounts from salaries have not been paid to the petitioners deliberately, the matter would stand referred to the Anti-Corruption for an enquiry. This whole exercise shall be completed within two months and report to this Court for a perusal in chamber be filed. Office to provide a copy of this order to the office of learned AAG and also to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter.

This whole exercise shall be completed within two months and report to this Court for a perusal in chamber be filed. Office to provide a copy of this order to the office of learned AAG and also to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
